homepage.hero.subtitle.message: One command translates your locale files. Every translation method — Google Translate, LLMs, custom APIs, coached pipelines — is a config option. Use what works for each language.

homepage.stats.tests.description: Stats bar label for test count

homepage.stats.dependencies.description: Stats bar label for dependency count

homepage.stats.scriptConverters.description: Stats bar label for script converter count

homepage.stats.languageRegisters.description: Stats bar label for language register count

homepage.quickExample.description.message: Each source→target pair gets its own translation method, model, and quality configuration. Use what works for each language — not a one-size-fits-all.

homepage.comparison.description.message: Crowdin, Phrase, and Locize are cloud platforms that require accounts, dashboards, and monthly fees. Rosetta is a CLI tool that runs in your project — no accounts, no dashboards, no vendor lock-in.

homepage.arena.titleLine1.message: Think you have the best method

homepage.arena.description.message: 7,000+ languages. ~130 have machine translation. The rest are an unsolved problem — and an open invitation. rosetta's evaluation harness benchmarks any method with fingerprinted, reproducible scoring. The leaderboard tracks every submission.

homepage.arena.calloutLine1.message: This is an unsolved problem that everyone in the world can contribute to.

homepage.arena.calloutLine2.message: Build a method. Score it. Give it back.

homepage.leaderboard.subtitle.message: Top translation methods ranked by chrF++ score.

homepage.seo.titleSuffix.description: SEO title suffix for the homepage

homepage.seo.description.message: An i18n framework where every translation method is a config option. Google Translate, LLMs, custom pipelines — one command, per-pair control, quality-gated.
homepage.seo.description.description: SEO meta description for the homepage

homepage.features.oneCommand.description.message: Auto-detect your locale files, format, and target languages. Translate what changed. Skip what didn't.

homepage.features.perPairMethods.descrip.message: Google Translate for French, an LLM for Japanese, a coached plugin for Plains Cree — all in the same config.

homepage.features.registersCoaching.desc.message: Steer the LLM with per-language tone instructions. Formal Sie-form for German, Taglish code-switching for Filipino, warrior's honor for Klingon.

homepage.features.contentAware.descripti.message: Code blocks, shortcodes, interpolation variables, and raw HTML are shielded during translation. The LLM never sees your code.

homepage.features.zeroDependencies.descr.message: Node.js built-ins only. No SDKs, no native modules, no build step. Works anywhere Node 20+ runs.

homepage.features.qualityGate.descriptio.message: Every translation is validated before writing. Wrong-script output, source echoes, length inflation, and placeholder corruption are caught and rejected.

homepage.useCases.saas.description.message: Translate your Next.js, Hugo, or React app to 30+ languages with per-pair quality control.

homepage.useCases.saas.linkText.description: Use case link text: SaaS Internationalization

homepage.useCases.pipeline.title.description: Use case title: Build a Custom Pipeline

homepage.useCases.pipeline.description.message: Chain LLMs with FST validators, dictionaries, and post-processors. Package it as a plugin.
homepage.useCases.pipeline.description.description: Use case description: Build a Custom Pipeline

homepage.useCases.pipeline.linkText.description: Use case link text: Build a Custom Pipeline

homepage.useCases.preservation.descripti.message: Coached LLM translation for languages with no API coverage — Indigenous, endangered, constructed.

homepage.useCases.preservation.linkText.description: Use case link text: Language Preservation

homepage.arena.cards.plugTest.title.description: Arena card title: Plug and Test

homepage.arena.cards.plugTest.descriptio.message: Run your method against standardized benchmarks. chrF++, exact match, FST acceptance — all computed by the same harness.
homepage.arena.cards.plugTest.descriptio.description: Arena card description: Plug and Test

homepage.arena.cards.plugTest.linkText.description: Arena card link text: Plug and Test

homepage.arena.cards.claimScore.title.description: Arena card title: Claim Your Score

homepage.arena.cards.claimScore.descript.message: Every submission is fingerprinted to a Git commit and scored against the same dataset. Open a PR to submit.
homepage.arena.cards.claimScore.descript.description: Arena card description: Claim Your Score

homepage.arena.cards.claimScore.linkText.description: Arena card link text: Claim Your Score

homepage.arena.cards.respectData.title.description: Arena card title: Respect the Data

homepage.arena.cards.respectData.descrip.message: Indigenous languages belong to their communities. rosetta supports OCAP, CARE, and Māori Data Sovereignty principles.
homepage.arena.cards.respectData.descrip.description: Arena card description: Respect the Data

homepage.arena.cards.respectData.linkTex.description: Arena card link text: Respect the Data

homepage.hero.titleSuffix.message: with one command, or with infinite customization
